requests.command: select d.data, d.mt_version from loan_pricing__loan_valuation.mt_doc_corp_loan as d where (d.mt_deleted = False  and  ((((CAST(d.data -> 'Metadata' -> 'DocumentMetadata' ->> 'StartDate' as timestamp without time zone) < :p0 and CAST(d.data -> 'Metadata' -> 'DocumentMetadata' ->> 'StartDate' as timestamp without time zone) >= :p1) and NOT(d.metadata_status LIKE :p2)) and d.data -> 'Metadata' -> 'DocumentMetadata' ->> 'Source' != :p3) and d.data -> 'Metadata' -> 'DocumentMetadata' ->> 'Source' != :p4))
